# ContentBlockTypes.IsForbidden method

Returns `true` when *type* is a forbidden sampling discriminator (R-14.8-a/b).

```csharp
public static bool IsForbidden(string type)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| type | The candidate discriminator. |

## Return Value

`true` when the type is `tool_use` or `tool_result`.
